terms.definition_en: Official administrative decision issued by a German authority.
Request for additional documents needed to process your case.
Legal deadline by which you must act or respond.
Formal objection filed against an administrative decision.
terms.definition_de: Rechtsmittel gegen einen Bescheid innerhalb der Einspruchsfrist.

terms.definition_en: Registration certificate confirming your residential address.
Basic income support for people in need (successor to Hartz IV).
terms.definition_de: Leistung zur Sicherung des Lebensunterhalts nach SGB II.
